meta.title: Community
meta.description: Per-category discussion boards — ask questions, share results, refine techniques.

header.title: Community
header.subtitle: Discussion boards split by category. Prompt questions, shared results, and technique talk live here.

empty.title: No discussions yet
empty.description: Open the board with its first thread.
empty.hint: Prompt questions, experiment results, model comparisons — anything goes.

detail.hiddenNotice: Hidden by a moderator. Only you and admins can see this thread.
detail.deleteConfirm: This removes the thread and all its comments. Continue?

comments.label: Comments
comments.composerPlaceholder: Share your take on this discussion…
comments.emptyDescription: Share your results or thoughts with the author.

meta.title: Start a discussion
meta.description: Start a new discussion thread in the community.

new.title: Start a discussion
new.subtitle: Questions, experiment results, technique write-ups — pick a board and go.
new.categoryHint: Choose the board this thread belongs to.
new.titlePlaceholder: What do you want to talk about?
new.bodyPlaceholder: More context attracts better answers: the prompt you used, what you expected, what actually happened.
new.bodyHint: At least 10 characters — rendered as plain text, no markdown.
